submit.title: Share a story
submit.typeLabel: What kind of story is this?
submit.typeHonorDesc: To honor a woman you admire. She doesn't need to know.
submit.typeTellDesc: To document a milestone that doesn't belong on any resume.
submit.textPlaceholder: Write here, in any language. Your voice is what matters.

submit.processingNotice: Your story will be processed by AI to detect language, correct spelling, and generate translations. Your original voice is always preserved.
